top.name: Spell Stitch
top.rules_text: Bind: play both halves of your next card this turn. The top resolves, then the bottom.

bottom.name: Arcane Drift
bottom.rules_text: Move 1 tile per spell cast this turn (max 4). Gain 2 armor per tile moved.

upgrades.description: Stitch discounts the bottom half. Drift grants more armor per tile.

changes.value: Bind: play both halves of your next card this turn. The bottom half costs 1 less.
Move 1 tile per spell cast this turn (max 4). Gain 3 armor per tile moved.

upgrades.description: Double Stitch: the bottom half is free when bound.

changes.value: Bind: play both halves of your next card this turn. The bottom half is free.

upgrades.description: Aether Drift: also gain shield per tile moved.

changes.value: Move 1 tile per spell cast this turn (max 4). Gain 3 armor and 2 shield per tile.

upgrades.description: Seamless: the bound card is not discarded — it returns to hand.

changes.value: Bind: play both halves of your next card this turn (bottom free). It returns to your hand instead of discarding.

upgrades.description: Tide Drift: the move cap rises to 6.

changes.value: Move 1 tile per spell cast this turn (max 6). Gain 3 armor and 2 shield per tile.

upgrades.description: Master Stitch: binds your next TWO cards.

changes.value: Bind: play both halves of your next 2 cards this turn (bottoms free). They return to hand.

upgrades.description: Riptide: each tile moved also banks charge.

changes.value: Move 1 tile per spell cast this turn (max 6). Per tile: 3 armor, 2 shield, 1 charge.
